name: Brownie Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom of a 9-inch Springform pan.
2. Prepare the brownie mix according to package directions and pour the batter evenly into the springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla. Mix until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Pour the mixture over the brownie layer.
6. Spoon melted chocolate chips over the cream cheese mixture, cutting through it several times to achieve a marble effect.
7. Bake at 350°F for an additional 35 minutes.
8. Allow the cake to cool before loosening it from the rim of the pan and removing the rim. Chill before serving.
9. Garnish with whipped cream if desired.
